subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down by the All-Powerful, Who hath appeared with the truth and made manifest whatsoever He willeth. Verily, He is the Omnipotent, the Almighty. We make mention of him that hath turned towards Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله القدیر الذی ظهر بالحق و اظهر ما اراد انه لهو المقتدر القدیر و نذکر من اقبل الیه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
